videos.title: Jeremy Howard interview at PytorchCon with Anna Tong
videos.highlights: Jeremy Howard discusses the democratization of AI through PyTorch, emphasizing how accessible tools are enabling more developers to build and deploy models. He highlights the importance of practical applications over theoretical complexity, with insights into fast.ai's educational approach.
videos.worthReading: The interview offers valuable perspectives from a leading AI educator on making machine learning more approachable, directly relevant for developers interested in practical implementation.
